subject.description: The phrase 'Hello World' rendered as playful cartoon letters
subject.letters: Each letter is completely unique — a different vivid color, a different exaggerated quirky shape, and a slightly different size

style.colors: Full rainbow spectrum — assign a distinct vivid color to every letter: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet, pink, cyan, magenta, lime, coral
style.letter_design: Each letter has its own personality: bouncy, stretched, rotated, bubbly, spiky, wavy, bold, outlined, shadowed — no two letters look the same
